name: 3M™ Overlaminate Label Material 7248, Clear Polyester, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Graffiti Resistant Overlaminating Durable Label Material 7248 is a 3M proprietary polyester designed to provide graffiti resistance when used as a protective overlaminate on various printed media. The film provides resistance to permanent marker, crayon, paint and other forms of defacement. This label product utilizes 3M™ Adhesive 400 that offers good wet-out, clarity and is non-yellowing when exposed to UV light.
benefits: Offers UV resistance and helps prevent color fading
Facestock resists abrasion, scuffs and weathering
Premium overlaminate for graffiti resistance against spray paint, crayon, marker and ball point pen
Superior abrasion, humidity, and solvent resistance

resources.title: 3M™ Graffiti Resistant Overlaminating Durable Label Material 7248
